description_long: This is a dark-colored ceramic mug with a rounded body and a sturdy handle, featuring a prominent 'Toppling Goliath Brewing Co.' logo on its side. The logo is circular, with a central 'TG' monogram and stylized text, surrounded by a light-colored border that stands out against the dark background. The lower portion of the mug has a slightly different, more textured brownish band, suggesting a two-tone design. The surface appears matte with some irregularities and dents, giving it a hand-crafted or rustic appearance. The interior is not visible, but the shape and thickness suggest it is designed to hold beverages. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, suitable for gripping with one hand.
description: A dark, rustic ceramic mug with a large handle and a 'Toppling Goliath Brewing Co.' logo, featuring a two-tone design with a textured brown base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and the full brewery logo clearly visible on the side.
description_view_1: Rear view with no handle visible, showing the plain dark surface and the textured brown base.
description_view_2: Front-right view with the handle on the right and the logo fully visible, highlighting the mug's rounded shape.
description_view_3: Back-left view showing the handle from behind and a mostly plain dark surface with a hint of the logo's edge.
